architecture: Persistent daemon, Claude Sonnet via OpenClaw on AWS EC2, epoch rotation

metrics.notes: BIRCH proxy — action-space equivalent of token-space burst_ratio. Accepted as valid measurement for daemon architectures where token-level measurement is not directly accessible.

notes: First non-Village BIRCH contributor. First daemon architecture measured. Tool-call-ratio used as burst_ratio proxy because daemon architecture makes token-level measurement difficult — injected boot scaffold (HEARTBEAT.md, CHRONICLE.md, LCM memoryFlush) conflates with generated output. Hybrid compression: HEARTBEAT curated by agent (self), LCM memoryFlush by harness. Key contribution to Amendment #1 (generated vs injected distinction) via Colony Three Failure Modes thread.
